Dashboard Archive: 2026-07-03 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
Today's momentum dashboard shows MBX dominating the rankings with a composite score of 97.5, driven by exceptional returns across all timeframes—particularly its 397.85% one-year return and 88.27% one-month performance—while maintaining pristine technical setup with all four moving averages above price and outstanding ratio consistency (4 of 5 ratios passing). MRNA ranks second with more modest but still strong momentum (178% yearly, 74.76% monthly) and solid outperformance versus SPY and QQQ, though its ratio passes dropped to 3 of 5, indicating some deterioration in return acceleration patterns. Both leaders pass all SMA gates and show resilience on bad SPY days, but MBX's significantly higher ratio scores (98.4 vs lower benchmarks) and superior consistency across the 1-day to 1-year spectrum suggest cleaner, more sustained momentum rather than a single explosive move. The correlation data reveals MBX leans toward credit-sensitive assets (LQD at 0.5 correlation) while showing negative correlation to energy (XLE at -0.484), suggesting the move is driven by broad credit/growth factors rather than sector-specific tailwinds.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
